description: Blind LLM clustering with no prior labels, no theoretical vocabulary

categories.name: generation and detection
categories.description: Generated universes, sequences, or worlds and applied detectors or measurements to observe outcomes

categories.name: parameter variation and measurement
categories.description: Varied a parameter or condition and measured resulting effects or metrics

categories.name: decomposition and compositional analysis
categories.description: Broke systems into components, expressed as operators, or tested composition and contribution

categories.name: classification and comparison
categories.description: Sorted items into categories or compared states such as collapse versus maintenance

categories.name: testing specific conditions
categories.description: Tested candidates, reconstruction under degradation, or predictive power of measurements

categories.name: structure and sequence analysis
categories.description: Built matrices, analyzed proximity structure, or represented worlds in multiple ways to apply detectors
